title: ecbolium atkinsonii
intro: Ecbolium atkinsonii, also known as Atkinson's bugloss, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a shrubby herb that grows in tropical and subtropical regions, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Ecbolium atkinsonii is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal infusion, with the leaves and stems being dried and used to make teas and infusions that can be used to treat various ailments.
